name: Nibiru Voyage
short_description: Nibiru Voyage is a classic scrolling game with weapon upgrades and hordes of enemy ships.
detailed_description:
The prediction of the collision of the Earth with a celestial body Nibiru came true. It turned out that Nibiru is not a planet at all, but an accumulation of alien structures and ships hostile to planet Earth. Go to the very heart of a hostile civilization and destroy the center of Nibiru to save the Earth.

You will be attacked by space pirates, extraterrestrial beings, cruel leaders.

Pick up weapons, pick up upgrades to become stronger.
Do not forget to monitor your health and use a protective force field to protect yourself from weak attacks.

Adventures await you!

Features:
- 9 levels
- A variety of enemies
- Dynamic gameplay
- Improvements for the spaceship
- The appearance of the ship changes when changing weapons
- Complex gameplay

Good luck pilot!
